title: Karmicpack 2 plus
description: a decently sized create focused kitchensink pack with mods such as Cobblemon, create, productive bees, the bumblezone, alex's caves , alex's mobs, and farmer's delight among others
body:
A pack by gay trans girls :3

Included is ~200 mods, such as create and a lot of create addons. Trans girls like stuffed animals, so of course theres also Blåhaj Restitched which adds the cuddly buddies (Sea animals) that we know and love, AND NOW WITH COBBLEMON :3

This is a tech-focused modpack, with things such as machines and automation. (And nuclear bombs :3) Want to blow up a village? Build a nuke. Want to be a cute girl? Create estrogen.

Be who you want, make what you want.

Be gay, do- FOR LEGAL REASONS I CANNOT FINISH THIS JOKE.
